CustomField.description: Short code (UA, GU, SRA...) for programmatic grouping. Valid values: UA, GU, SRA, SA, CAI, AA, LA, AGA, MS, FUE, CE, MON, HCB.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Short programmatic code for the finding category. Valid values: UA, GU, SRA, SA, CAI, AA, LA, AGA, MS, FUE, CE, MON, HCB.
CustomField.label: Category Code
